name: Sempervirens Point Parking
content: I went on a very long hike here that strayed far off the trail. I don’t remember ever coming home from this hike. We discovered a lot of old cars at the bottom of a hill around here. There is not much else that matches the experience of wandering through a forest and being able to reach out and grab handfuls of huckleberries while you walk. I imagine this is what it feels like to be a bear. A real hamster-sized bear….
